task: Pass the first trending chess puzzle.
final_result_response:
I was unable to complete the task of passing the first trending chess puzzle. The **Trending Puzzles** section on Chess.com is only visible to **logged-in users**. I navigated to https://www.chess.com/puzzles and thoroughly explored the page, but the trending puzzles section (along with any "Pass" button) is hidden behind authentication.

The login page is currently open at https://www.chess.com/login and ready for you to enter your credentials. Please log in and then I can proceed to find the Trending Puzzles section and click the Pass button on the first puzzle.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted the agent to click the "Pass" button on the first trending chess puzzle on Chess.com. Success would require: navigating to the trending puzzles section, finding the first puzzle listed there, and clicking a Pass/Skip button on it.

**Output Assessment:** The agent reported failure — it was unable to find the "Trending Puzzles" section because that section is gated behind authentication. No login credentials were provided in the task metadata (login_cookie: null, login_type: null). The agent explored multiple URLs and page states over 43 steps, never located the trending puzzles section, and ultimately navigated to the login page before calling done with a failure report.

**Evidence:** Step 5 shows the puzzles page displayed a gamified "Puzzle Path" map with no trending puzzles section. Step 15 shows a chess puzzle interface with no trending section visible. The agent never found the trending puzzles section across multiple navigations and scroll attempts. No "Pass" button was ever found or clicked. The task metadata confirms no authentication was provided (login_cookie: null), which the agent correctly identified as the blocker. The execution integrity status is "healthy," so there was no runtime failure — the agent simply could not access an authenticated feature without credentials.

**Summary:** The agent never located the Trending Puzzles section or clicked any Pass button, because the section requires authentication and no login credentials were provided. The task was not completed.
